name: aeo-custom-blocks/media-showcase
title: AEO Testimonials & Media Showcase
description: SEO-optimized testimonials grid combining clean typography, CTAs, custom background colors, and lazy-loaded avatars.

subtitle.default: Proven results across next-generation search and answer engines.

default.quote: The agentic automation pipeline saved us over 40 hours a week and increased our visibility on search engines by 340%.
default.expandedQuote: We were initially skeptical about transitioning to an AI-driven content pipeline, but the results speak for themselves. The system seamlessly indexes fresh research schemas and maintains zero layout shift.
default.author: Sarah Jenkins

default.quote: Our lead response time dropped to under 12 seconds with the custom AEO Form Builder integrations.
default.expandedQuote: The lead capture pipeline instantly routes submissions to our sales desk. High contrast and clean accessibility ensure we capture every click without cluttering our landing pages.
default.author: David Chen
